chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5515 of 2025 [Mushtaq Ali Khiyani vs. FOP & others] Petitioner: Mushtaq Ali Khiyani son of Badruddin Khiyani through Mr. Muhammad Shahid Malik, Advocate. Date of hearing: 20-11-2025 Date of decision: 20-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Dispute of the Petitioner is essentially with the Respondents 9 to 11, who are neighbors. Suffice to say that no writ can issue against private persons. Petition is misconceived and is dismissed in limine alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
